brand.subtitle: AI Civic Intelligence
brand.tagline: Report civic issues. Track promises. Verify truth.
brand.taglineFull: From street problems to national promises, one AI-powered, evidence-backed accountability platform.
brand.heroSubheadline: AI-powered civic intelligence on people's issues and government promises, backed by evidence and accountability assessment.

home.heroTitle: Report civic issues. Track promises. Verify truth.
home.notFollowingTitle: You're not following any commitments yet.
home.notFollowingDesc: Tap ❤ on any commitment to follow it.
home.noTrending: No commitments trending right now. Check back later.
home.scoreDisclaimer: Republic Index grade is shown only after the 30-day baseline window.
home.scoreDisclaimerFull: Republic Index is computed from 5 weighted metrics: delivery rate (25%), average progress (30%), trust score (15%), budget utilization (20%), and citizen sentiment (10%). During the opening baseline window, the public view emphasizes evidence coverage, review coverage, and movement signals instead of a letter grade.
home.baselineDisclaimer: Baseline window active: public grade is intentionally paused.
home.baselineDisclaimerFull: The first 30 days are used to establish evidence quality, review coverage, and source depth. This avoids unfair Day-1 grading and keeps the report card trustworthy.

footer.brandDesc: AI scans 80+ sources daily to track government commitments, verify evidence, and score accountability.
footer.missionText: Built with transparency for Nepal's future. Every citizen deserves to see where public funds go and what progress is being made.
footer.trustRuleDesc: Official, discovered, public, and inferred signals stay separate so people can see what is confirmed and what still needs scrutiny.
footer.missionDesc: AI-powered civic intelligence. Track public commitments, verify evidence, expose corruption, and measure accountability — all source-backed.
footer.tagline: Report civic issues. Track promises. Verify truth.
footer.nationsReportCard: From street problems to national promises, one AI-powered, evidence-backed accountability platform.

chat.askDescEmpty: Ask about commitments, evidence, corruption, delays, and more. AI-powered, bilingual.

tracker.taglineEn: Every commitment, every proof — हरेक वचनबद्धता, हरेक प्रमाण
tracker.taglineNe: हरेक वचनबद्धता, हरेक प्रमाण — Every commitment, every proof
tracker.nationalReportCard: National report card, campaign entry point
tracker.campaignDossier: Balen is now framed as a live campaign dossier
tracker.campaignLensInside: A campaign lens inside the national tracker
tracker.campaignDossierDesc: This view now foregrounds the Balen campaign angle while keeping the tracker as the source of truth underneath.
tracker.campaignLensInsideDesc: This spotlight gives Balen's campaign entry point a visual home without slowing the top of the page. The tracker still loads as the main product first.
tracker.scrollForSpotlight: Scroll for the campaign spotlight and evidence context below.
tracker.openCampaignSpotlight: Open the campaign spotlight to frame this tracker around Balen's first 100 days.
tracker.headlineMovedToday: {count} commitments moved today across Nepal Republic.
tracker.headlineTracking: Tracking {total} commitments across Nepal's public accountability story.
tracker.subheadWithArticle: Latest signal: {headline} from {source}. {evidence} evidence links are already attached across the tracker.
tracker.subheadDefault: {articles} articles scanned, {withEvidence} commitments with evidence, and a live record built for daily accountability.
tracker.touchedLast7Days: commitments touched in the last 7 days
tracker.signalQuiet: The signal feed is quiet right now, but the tracker is still ready for the next verified movement.
tracker.whyPeopleComeBackDesc: Daily changes, evidence trails, and one public record that keeps getting sharper as signals and citizen input arrive.
tracker.startWatchlist: Start a watchlist worth returning for
tracker.watchlistMovedToday: {count} of your watched commitments moved today.
tracker.watchlistEmpty: Save the commitments you care about and this tracker becomes personal. That is what turns a one-time visit into a daily habit.
tracker.makeTrackerLocal: Make the tracker feel close to home
tracker.localCommitments: {count} commitments in this tracker can already be framed through your area or national impact.
tracker.localEmpty: Set your province or district and Nepal Republic can stop feeling abstract. Local context is what makes accountability feel personal.
tracker.trustLayerDesc: Signals and media can flood in constantly, but Nepal Republic only becomes useful when evidence is legible and public truth is controlled.
tracker.civicProduct: Nepal Republic should feel like a civic institution you can shape
tracker.actionMovedToday: {count} commitments moved today. Watch them, verify them, and push the record forward.
tracker.actionNothingMoved: Nothing major moved today yet. That is exactly when evidence, tips, and citizen verification matter most.
tracker.signalDesc: A citizen, source, or reporter submits proof, contradiction, or context.
tracker.reviewDesc: The engine structures it, but reviewed decisions are what shape the public record.
tracker.outcomeDesc: People see the movement, the evidence trail, and the updated accountability story.

accountability.pageSubtitle: What the government is doing, what it isn't, and what the public wants — all in one place
accountability.cantVerifyDesc: These sources are unreachable, or these promises have zero news coverage — we literally have no information.

trustLane.officialDesc: Government-published projects, milestones, budgets, and formal updates.
trustLane.discoveredDesc: Signals from news, procurement portals, notices, and open web sources.

trustLane.inferredDesc: Analytical signals such as trend shifts, confidence, and anomaly warnings.

gov.publicResponsibility: Public responsibility is shown by institution, not as a personal score. This page is meant to clarify ownership, ongoing work, and visible outcomes.

disputes.title: Disputes
disputes.description: See who's disagreeing about what — and what they're saying
disputes.noDisputesDesc: When different sources disagree about the same commitment, they'll appear here
disputes.howThisWorksP1: Our AI scans news from 80+ sources and classifies each signal as either "confirms" or "contradicts" a government commitment.
disputes.howThisWorksP2: When the same commitment has both types of signals from different sources, it shows up here as disputed.
disputes.howThisWorksP3: The "heat" score reflects both the number of conflicting signals and how recent the activity is.

scorecard.title: Government Ministries
scorecard.description: What each ministry is supposed to do, and how they're performing
scorecard.scoringIntro: Each body is scored based on the commitments under their responsibility:
scorecard.scoringProgress: Average Progress (30%) — mean progress across commitments
scorecard.scoringShared: A commitment may appear under multiple bodies if responsibility is shared.
